name: berabuddies/agentflow
summary: Graph-based orchestration runtime for Codex, Claude, and Kimi that treats workflows as dependency graphs, enabling fanout, merge, iterative loops, worktrees, and remote execution.
evidence: Provides a concrete graph runtime for multi-agent workflows, including parallel fanout, merge, and loop patterns.
Codex is one of several supported agents, so the project is best treated as workflow infrastructure rather than a Codex-first framework.
